chunks.content:
Article: Naokos death and Nervs creation
[]: Naoko's death and Nerv's creation             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jan 27, 2008 11:44 pm This was brought up during a discussion with V in the wiki...what caused the Gehirn-Nerv changeover? Was Gehirn meant to become Nerv as soon as the Magi supercomputers were activated- that is, the day of Naoko's death? Or was it Naoko's death that pushed forward Nerv's formation date? I haven't watched the episode in a while (and I have exams). If anyone can help clarify, please do.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Jan 27, 2008 11:54 pm well like I pointed out over on the wiki, they said the base was JUST finished and all they had to do was turn the power on. Then Naoko died. Gehirn became Nerv. One of two possibilities: 1 - Naoko's death prompted the reorganization into Nerv 2 - Naoko's death just happened to be the same day they finished the base. Finishing the base is what finally prompted the switch from Gehirn to Nerv. I believe "2" because it seems more likely/implied that when the base became fully operational, they'd switch from Gehirn (tasked with building everything) to Nerv (tasked with running everything)

[]:             Quote Post by AsukaChan » Mon Jan 28, 2008 2:10 am I agree. I know Naoko was important and all, but I doubt that her death was significant enough at that point to spur them onwards enough to make them switch to Nerv. I just think it was unfortunate timing for Naoko that she happened to die right before they became Nerv. I'm sure if she hadn't died her and Ritsuko would have continued to work together within Nerv.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Jan 28, 2008 8:50 am V wrote: well like I pointed out over on the wiki, they said the base was JUST finished and all they had to do was turn the power on.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Jan 28, 2008 8:58 am a few lines before that when Ritsuko says "all we have to do is turn the power on"

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Jan 28, 2008 9:27 am Oh right, but aren't they just talking about the Magi rather than the entire 1st Branch (as you implied here: http://evageeks.org/FGP/Talk:Rei_Ayanami)? I don't know how soon after the Magi were first powered up that they started to run the municipal government and Nerv itself - and the construction of Tokyo-3 isn't said to be finished until well late into the series (the final 7th construction phase). [code:1]TEXT: (S.C. MAGI SYSTEM) Completed AKAGI: Magi Casper, Magi Balthasar, and Magi Melchior. The Magi are the three parts that make up who I am. The scientist in me, the mother in me, and the woman in me. And those three elements will be in constant conflict with one another. RITSUKO: The three parts of you... The only thing left is to power it up, right? I'm going to go home early today. Misato's coming back.[/code:1]
